reasonSummary: Tax and spread wipe out the usable edge. Buy limit makes the opportunity smaller than it first appears for this bankroll bucket.

flagDetails.explanation: Tax and spread wipe out the usable edge.
flagDetails.safeAlternative: Avoid unless the spread improves materially.

flagDetails.explanation: Buy limit makes the opportunity smaller than it first appears for this bankroll bucket.
flagDetails.safeAlternative: Either trade small on purpose or rotate into a better-capacity item.

flagDetails.explanation: Recent fill flow looks too thin relative to the size the market claims to support.
flagDetails.safeAlternative: Avoid or trade far smaller size.

flagDetails.explanation: This is a high-ticket item with weak hourly turnover. You may be reading a highly concentrated market, not a clean opportunity.
flagDetails.safeAlternative: Treat as trap-prone unless you have unusually strong reason to believe the fills are real.

flagDetails.explanation: The latest signal is stale enough that the displayed edge may already have moved.
This also matches a broader execution mistake pattern already present in your memory log.
flagDetails.safeAlternative: Trade smaller or wait for a cleaner setup.

strengths.explanation: The market looks relatively stable instead of violently stretched.

memoryNotes: Broader repeated style pattern detected: fake spread.
